briefdescription.para: Interrupt Handler : -Polls for each of the valid sources -Checks if there is a message -Reads the message -Inverts the bits -Sends back the inverted message as response.

inbodydescription.para: < Holds the IPI status register value

briefdescription.para: Tests the IPI by sending a message and checking the response.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t cmdId, void *struct_msg, uint32_t size, MboxCoreId receiver_id, MboxCoreId core_id)
memberdef.name: write_mboxcmd

memberdef.argsstring: (MBCmdId_E cmd, void *data, uint32_t size, uint8_t dest_cpu, uint8_t src_cpu)
memberdef.name: Send_Command

memberdef.argsstring: (MBCmdId_E res, void *data, uint32_t size, uint8_t dest_cpu, uint8_t src_cpu)
memberdef.name: Send_Response

memberdef.argsstring: (MBCmdId_E cmd, void *data, uint32_t size, MboxCoreId core_id, MboxCoreId src_cpu)
memberdef.name: ParseCommand

memberdef.argsstring: (MBCmdId_E cmd, void *data, uint32_t size, MboxCoreId core_id, MboxCoreId src_cpu)
memberdef.name: ApuProcessCommand

memberdef.argsstring: (MBCmdId_E cmd, void *data, uint32_t size, MboxCoreId core_id, MboxCoreId src_cpu)
memberdef.name: ApuProcessFusaCommand
